title: helianthemum nummularium f. multiplex
intro: Helianthemum nummularium f. multiplex, commonly known as rockrose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of rockrose include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and ulcers. Rockrose can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to promote wound healing and alleviate skin issues.
